description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막과 황금빛 과즙이 중력 없는 액체 공간 속에서 흐르는, 가장 원초적이고 살아 숨 쉬는 유기적 생명의 상태를 표현합니다.
description.en: A representation of organic life in its most primal, breathing state, where emerald membranes and golden nectar flow in a weightless liquid void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Verdant Respiration.' A living architectural heart composed of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D deep vascular capillaries. The entity floats in a #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere, exhaling thick, viscous ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar. Macro focus on the semi-permeable cellular pores and rhythmic pulses of light. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
